texto: Love is precious, and shouldn’t be wasted on every passing whim, or it will mean nothing by the time you truly wish to share it with someone who matters.” I said softly.Silvers, Shayne (2012-10-08). Obsidian Son: A Novel In The Nate Temple Supernatural Thriller Series (The Temple Chronicles Book 1) (p. 194). Argento Publishing. Kindle Edition.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Shayne Silvers sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Love is precious, and shouldn’t be wasted on every passing whim, or it will mean nothing by the t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, love-quotes, temple, útil em momentos de reflexao.
